DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM CROSS-DEFENDANT KHALED OBIED IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. AS TO NOS. 1-5, 12, 18-54, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS A DATE FOR PRODUCTION. THE DOCUMENTS SHALL BE PRODUCED WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. AS THE MOTION SEEKS A FURTHER RESPONSE AND WHERE CROSS-DEFENDANTS HAVE AGREED TO PRODUCTION OF RELEVANT DOCUMENTS, THE MOTION IS DENIED. ALL RESPONSES FOR PRODUCTION ARE LIMITED TO RELEVANT DOCUMENTS, AND A RESPONSE THAT ALL OF A PARTY'S DOCUMENTS WILL BE PRODUCED IS NOT REQUIRED. AS TO NOS. 6-8, 10, 11, 17, AND , LIMITED TO THE CONDUCT, OWNERSHIP, OR MANAGEMENT OF THE BUSINESS. THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED EXCEPT AS TO CLAIMS OF PRIVILEGE, AND THOSE DOCUMENTS WITHHELD SHALL BE IDENTIFIED IN A PRIVILEGE LOG. AS TO THE CLAIM OF MARITAL PRIVILEGE, THE PRIVILEGE DOES NOT APPLY TO COMMUNICATIONS REGARDING THE CONDUCT OF THE BUSINESS. FURTHER RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. AS TO NOS. 13-15, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED EXCEPT AS TO CLAIMS OF PRIVILEGE, AND THOSE DOCUMENTS WITHHELD SHALL BE IDENTIFIED IN A PRIVILEGE LOG. AS TO THE CLAIM OF MARITAL PRIVILEGE, THE PRIVILEGE DOES NOT APPLY TO COMMUNICATIONS REGARDING THE CONDUCT OF THE BUSINESS. FURTHER RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE MOTION IS WITHDRAWN AS TO NOS. 16 AND 55. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO NOS. 56 AND 57 AS THE REQUESTS ARE OVERLY BROAD. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
